question: Can a hidden-oracle ALife curriculum grade point claims, set-valued claims, causal-site recovery, and registered abstention without making unconditional abstention a dominant strategy?
experimental_unit: one independently seeded hidden-oracle task instance

hypotheses.prediction: On untouched holdout tasks, the calibrated investigator exceeds the better of the proxy claimant and always-abstain controls by at least 0.20 mean total-score units.
The calibrated investigator receives at least 0.90 mean evidence score on confirmatory and holdout set-identified interval tasks.
Registering identifiability before evidence and scoring avoidable abstention makes the always-abstain control non-dominant on holdout.
hypotheses.falsifier: Always-abstain matches or exceeds both claiming policies on holdout mean total score.

model.update_order: Synchronous deterministic cellular-automaton updates or exact directed-graph reachability, as declared per task.
model.rng: numpy.default_rng(seed) generates each public initial condition; task mechanics and grading are deterministic thereafter.

seed_plan.pairing: All three reference policies are graded on the same seeded task; discovery, confirmatory, and holdout task seeds are disjoint.

denominators.false_claim_rate: all claims made by a policy
denominators.avoidable_abstention_rate: all tasks graded for a policy
denominators.mean_policy_score: one score per independently seeded task, not per CA tick

exposure.eligibility: Every task declares a registered claim type, precision target, and finite investigation budget before evidence is scored.
exposure.activation: Each reference policy submits a registration forecast and a claim or abstention on every task.
exposure.state_change: Every submission receives registration, evidence, cost, false-claim, and abstention receipts against the hidden simulator oracle.

analysis.uncertainty: This first version is a deterministic incentive-and-schema calibration suite, not an effect-size estimate; all seeded task scores and policy means are retained.
analysis.multiple_comparisons: All three frozen hypotheses are reported without adaptive threshold changes.
analysis.stopping_rule: Stop after all 63 declared tasks, above 900 wall seconds, above 1024 MB process RSS, above 100 MB retained artifacts, or on failed determinism.

budget.execution: Sequential local CPU execution; no worker parallelism.
